Patch Set 30:

(1 comment)

I have run the codes on my local with docker-compose, and tried to test the below request,

http://localhost:8883/cps/api/v1/dataspaces/my-store/anchors/bookstore-anchor/nodes/query?cps-path=//categories[@numberOfBooks=1 or @numberOfBooks=2] 

I got this error:

"could not extract ResultSet; SQL [n/a]; nested exception is org.hibernate.exception.SQLGrammarException: could not extract ResultSet"

Could you please confirm, if I missed something?

Thanks.

Patch Set 30:

(1 comment)

> Patch Set 30:
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> I have run the codes on my local with docker-compose, and tried to test the below request,
> 
> http://localhost:8883/cps/api/v1/dataspaces/my-store/anchors/bookstore-anchor/nodes/query?cps-path=//categories[@numberOfBooks=1 or @numberOfBooks=2] 
> 
> I got this error:
> 
> "could not extract ResultSet; SQL [n/a]; nested exception is org.hibernate.exception.SQLGrammarException: could not extract ResultSet"
> 
> Could you please confirm, if I missed something?
> 
> Thanks.

Yes, this is a known limitation (caused by leaf conditions being stored in a Map, so the second @numberOfBooks overwrites the first) - we can only mix unique leaf conditions like [@numberOfBooks=1 or @price=10], we can't use the same leaf twice. It was agreed in a previous meeting to fix this as a separate task.

Patch Set 30:

Thanks for the comments, Daniel.
